title: TelePastries Extended
body:
**This mod is a fork of the original [TelePastries](https://modrinth.com/mod/telepastries) by [Mrbysco](https://modrinth.com/user/Mrbysco) and [ShyNieke](https://modrinth.com/user/ShyNieke). All credit goes to them for the original mod. Do not install this mod alongside the original.**

**This mod is intended for modpack developers, and as such, has very basic crafting recipes. I recommend using either KubeJS or CraftTweaker to make your own recipes to fit your pack.**

![A screenshot of all 6 cakes, lined up and showcased.](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/9e7f060f4ee7d1cef293a446939c6f5b76e6638e.png)

Telepastries. Fluffy baked goods that have the power to transport people across dimensions upon consumption. Legend has it they were baked for people stuck in the sky to still be able to visit other dimensions without having access to normal portals (especially the end portal).

This mod adds 6 cakes, one for each of the 3 vanilla dimensions, plus an additional 3 for certain other mods:
- [The Lost Cities](https://modrinth.com/mod/the-lost-cities)
- [The Twilight Forest](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/the-twilight-forest)
- [The Aether](https://modrinth.com/mod/aether) (Newest addition!)

Additionally, this mod has 3 'custom cakes', for use in creating cakes to dimensions that are not natively supported. You can customise the custom cakes in the mod's `telepastries-common.toml` file inside your config folder.
